summary: Add a build artifact hygiene guard (git ignores + CLI + CI).

steps.title: Capture guard requirements
steps.notes: Documented backlog needs, CLI idea, receipts, and risks.

steps.title: Design guard + allowlist
steps.notes: Define detection rules, allowlist, CLI flags, and CI integration.

steps.title: Implement guard + tests
steps.notes: Update .gitignore, add guard CLI, write tests/docs, and wire CI.

checkpoint.description: Build artifact guard prevents tracked build outputs and CI enforces it.
